Package org.key_project.slicing.graph

Class DependencyGraph

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.slicing.graph.DependencyGraph
public class DependencyGraph extends Object
The dependency graph tracks the flow of rule applications in the proof tree. Formulas (plus their branch location and polarity) correspond to nodes (see TrackedFormula). Other kinds of graph nodes exist (ClosedGoal, AddedRule, ...).

Each proof step defines a hyperedge of the dependency graph. It starts at the inputs used by the rule application and ends at the newly introduced formulas (or other graph nodes). To simplify the implementation, each hyperedge is split into a collection of regular edges.

  • Constructor Details

    • DependencyGraph

      public DependencyGraph()

  • Method Details

    • addRuleApplication

      public void addRuleApplication(Node node, Collection<Pair<GraphNode,Boolean>> input, Collection<GraphNode> output)
      Add a rule application to the dependency graph.
      Parameters:
      node - the node to add
      input - inputs required by this proof step (pairs of graph node + whether the rule app consumes the node)
      output - outputs produced by this proof step

    • containsNode

      public boolean containsNode(GraphNode node)
      Parameters:
      node - a graph node
      Returns:
      whether the graph contains that node

    • incomingEdgesOf

      public Stream<Node> incomingEdgesOf(GraphNode node)
      Parameters:
      node - a graph node
      Returns:
      the rule application(s) that produced the graph node, if any

    • incomingGraphEdgesOf

      public Stream<Triple<Node,GraphNode,AnnotatedEdge>> incomingGraphEdgesOf(GraphNode node)
      Parameters:
      node - a graph node
      Returns:
      the incoming (graph edges, graph sources) of that node

    • outgoingEdgesOf

      public Stream<Node> outgoingEdgesOf(GraphNode node)
      Parameters:
      node - a graph node
      Returns:
      the rule application(s) that used the graph node, if any

    • outgoingGraphEdgesOf

      public Stream<Triple<Node,GraphNode,AnnotatedEdge>> outgoingGraphEdgesOf(GraphNode node)
      Parameters:
      node - a graph node
      Returns:
      the outgoing (graph edges, graph targets) of that node

    • nodesInBranch

      public Stream<GraphNode> nodesInBranch(BranchLocation location)
      Parameters:
      location - branch location
      Returns:
      graph nodes created in that branch (and descendent branches)

    • goalsInBranch

      public Stream<ClosedGoal> goalsInBranch(BranchLocation location)
      Parameters:
      location - branch location
      Returns:
      closed goals in that branch and descendents

    • nodes

      public Iterable<GraphNode> nodes()
      Returns:
      all nodes contained in the graph

    • prune

      public void prune(Node pruneTarget)
      Process a prune of the proof tree. Deletes graph data that belongs to removed steps.
      Parameters:
      pruneTarget - the node up to which the prune occurs

    • neighborsOf

      public Stream<GraphNode> neighborsOf(GraphNode node)
      Parameters:
      node - graph node
      Returns:
      neighbors of that graph node (all nodes connected by incoming or outgoing edge)

    • edgesOf

      public Collection<AnnotatedEdge> edgesOf(Node proofStep)
      Gets all the edges representing the supplied proof step. May be used to reconstruct the hyperedge corresponding to the proof step.
      Parameters:
      proofStep - the proof step
      Returns:
      the edges representing this step

    • inputOf

      public GraphNode inputOf(AnnotatedEdge edge)
      Parameters:
      edge - a graph edge
      Returns:
      source node of this edge

    • outputOf

      public GraphNode outputOf(AnnotatedEdge edge)
      Parameters:
      edge - a graph edge
      Returns:
      target node of this edge

    • inputsOf

      public Stream<GraphNode> inputsOf(Node proofStep)
      Parameters:
      proofStep - a proof step
      Returns:
      the graph nodes required by that step

    • outputsOf

      public Stream<GraphNode> outputsOf(Node proofStep)
      Parameters:
      proofStep - a proof step
      Returns:
      the graph nodes created by that step

    • inputsConsumedBy

      public Stream<GraphNode> inputsConsumedBy(Node proofStep)
      Parameters:
      proofStep - a proof step
      Returns:
      the graph nodes replaced by this proof step (only formulas)

    • edgesUsing

      public Stream<AnnotatedEdge> edgesUsing(GraphNode node)
      Parameters:
      node - graph node
      Returns:
      the outgoing edges of that node

    • edgesConsuming

      public Stream<AnnotatedEdge> edgesConsuming(GraphNode node)
      Parameters:
      node - graph node
      Returns:
      the edge(s) whose proof steps replace this graph node

    • edgesProducing

      public Stream<AnnotatedEdge> edgesProducing(GraphNode node)
      Parameters:
      node - graph node
      Returns:
      edges leading to this graph node (proof steps that produced this node)

    • countNodes

      public int countNodes()
      Returns:
      number of stored graph nodes

    • countEdges

      public int countEdges()
      Get the number of edges in this dependency graph. May be larger than the number of represented proof steps, if some proof steps use or produce more than one formula.
      Returns:
      number of stored graph edges

    • nodeAndPreviousDerivations

      public Collection<GraphNode> nodeAndPreviousDerivations(GraphNode node)
      Return the graph node and any previous derivations of it in the same branch.
      Parameters:
      node - graph node
      Returns:
      passed graph node and equivalent nodes

    • getGraphNode

      public GraphNode getGraphNode(Proof proof, BranchLocation locationGuess, PosInOccurrence pio)
      Get the graph node of the provided PosInOccurence.
      Parameters:
      proof - the proof
      locationGuess - best guess for the branch the formula was derived in (allowed to be more specific than the correct branch location)
      pio - formula
      Returns:
      graph node, null if not found
